description: Performance optimization: Server Components + Memo + CSS animations replacing framer-motion in MonthGrid, EventCard, DayView

changes: Converted Dashboard to Server Component (RSC)
Converted Calendar to Server Component (RSC)
Replaced framer-motion with CSS animations in MonthGrid (42 buttons)
Replaced framer-motion with CSS animations in EventCard
Replaced framer-motion with CSS animations in DayView
Added React.memo to prevent re-renders
Code-split EventForm and DeleteEventModal
Removed margin transition causing CLS
Deferred theme script
Added CSS containment for paint isolation

description: Event card edit button + auth redirect to dashboard

changes: Changed EventCard from clickable-card to separate edit button on right side
Added PencilSimple icon edit button to EventCard
Replaced onClick prop with onEdit prop in EventCard
Updated all EventCard usages (dashboard, calendar, day-view)
Converted sign-in page to Server Component with auth check
Converted sign-up page to Server Component with auth check
Added redirect('/dashboard') for already-authenticated users

description: Font display swap + preconnect + image priority optimizations

changes: Added display: swap to Google Fonts
Added preconnect for fonts.gstatic.com
Added preconnect/dns-prefetch for Clerk
Added priority loading to landing nav image
Added priority loading to auth layout image
Added lazy loading to sidebar image
asi.remaining_issue: LCP still 9.4s due to text-based LCP element requiring custom font download
